name: My Notes
description: A personal space for ideas, notes, and drafts

content.title: My Notes
content.content:
# My Notes

This is your personal space. Use it to capture ideas, write drafts, or organize your thoughts.

## Getting started

- **Edit this page** to make it your own — click the pencil icon above
- **Create sub-pages** to organize content into topics
- **Use the chat** at the top of your dashboard to ask questions or brainstorm with the AI assistant

## Tips

- Pages support rich **Markdown** with code blocks, tables, diagrams (Mermaid), and math (MathJax)
- You can link to other nodes by referencing their path: `@path/to/node`
- Collaborate with others by sharing your page's URL
